$comment: Example seo block -- the per-app page/site metadata the shell needs beyond branding (brand.json) and navigation (menu.json). renderApp merges this with brand.json, menu.json and the CDN manifest. description, url and image are required; everything else falls back to a brand-derived or COBD default.
